options.text: Sounds good! I’ll slide into your DMs this weekend.
Okay, see you at the office tomorrow.
I’m busy next month, so maybe never.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了口语化表达 'slide into your DMs'，符合网络社交语境，且回应了‘catch up soon’。选项2假设了工作场景，语境不符；选项3语气消极，不符合积极收尾的社交礼仪；选项4是感谢结束语，未回应‘下次再聊’的意图。
content.speakerText: I’ve got to head out, but let’s catch up soon!
content.speakerTextCn: 我得走了，但我们很快再聊吧！
